Call View Profile
Monday, July 7
9:14 AM

Hey! Morning 👋 Did you get a chance to look at the new design mockups I sent over?

9:19 AM

Yes! Just finished reviewing them. The onboarding flow looks amazing 🔥 I have a few minor comments on the button hierarchy in screen 4.

9:20

Specifically on the CTA button — I think we should bump it to 48px height and use the filled violet style rather than outlined. Makes it much more prominent.

9:32 AM

Good call on the button! Here's the updated version:

onboarding-cta-updated.figma.png · 890 KB
10:01 AM

Perfect! Sending over the full component spec doc too:

10:22 AM

Hey, can you review the Figma file before the standup? I want to make sure we're aligned on the component naming before we share with the team 🙏
